composites.title: Lakeside Reverie at Plitvice in Autumn
composites.prompt: A young solo female model with long blonde hair and Korean facial features is seated sideways on a rustic wooden chair at the edge of one of Plitvice Lakes iconic wooden walkways, Croatia, during peak autumn. One leg is elegantly crossed, she leans back with one hand resting near a small espresso cup placed on the weathered railing, the other hand lightly touching her hair, her gaze drifting dreamily toward the cascading turquoise waterfalls beyond. She wears a navy and white Breton stripe top, high-waisted wide-leg cream trousers, a red silk neck scarf, and nude ballet flats. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic, cinematic editorial style.

composites.title: Cherry Blossom Parisian Reverie
composites.prompt: Photorealistic editorial fashion photograph. A young woman with long blonde hair and Korean facial features is seated sideways on a delicate white bistro chair beneath a breathtaking tunnel of cherry blossom trees in full bloom, Japan. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic, cinematic Vogue editorial style, 16:9 aspect ratio.

composites.title: Salar de Uyuni Sunrise Bolivia
composites.prompt: Aerial view of Salar de Uyuni salt flat at sunrise in Bolivia, perfect mirror reflection of dramatic pink and orange sky, endless white crystalline salt crust stretching to the horizon, small cactus islands emerging from the reflective surface, golden light rays breaking through clouds, ultra-wide landscape photography, photorealistic, 8K

composites.title: Zhangjiajie Pillar Mountains Sunrise China
composites.prompt: Dramatic sunrise over the towering sandstone pillar formations of Zhangjiajie National Forest Park, China — ethereal mist weaving between the pinnacles, warm golden orange light breaking through clouds illuminating the unique quartzite rock columns, deep lacy-green forest below, soft veils of cloud floating through the valley, surreal dimension, cinematic, photorealistic, 8K

composites.title: Patagonia Torres del Paine Parisian Reverie Composite
composites.prompt: Photorealistic composite image of an elegant blonde woman in a navy and white Breton stripe top, high-waisted wide-leg cream trousers, red silk neck scarf, nude ballet flats, and a small tan leather crossbody bag — seated sideways on a bistro chair with one leg crossed, leaning back elegantly, one hand near an espresso cup on a marble bistro table, the other hand lightly touching her hair, gazing dreamily into the distance. Background: dramatic Patagonia Torres del Paine glacial lake, iconic jagged granite towers, turquoise glacial waters, sweeping Patagonian sky. Cinematic golden-hour lighting, photorealistic, high detail.
composites.scenery: Patagonia Torres del Paine Glacial Lake Argentina

poses.title: Cherry Blossom Garden Parasol Grace
poses.prompt: A young Korean female model with long blonde hair standing gracefully in a blooming cherry blossom garden, holding a delicate white lace parasol over one shoulder, head gently tilted with a soft elegant smile, wearing a flowing pastel pink midi dress with subtle floral embroidery, soft natural golden-hour light filtering through falling cherry blossom petals
poses.style: Editorial fashion photography, golden-hour warmth, film-like, ultra-realistic, 4K

scenery.title: Faroe Islands Sea Cliffs Atlantic Storm
scenery.prompt: Dramatic aerial view of the Faroe Islands' towering sea cliffs during a powerful Atlantic storm, massive waves crashing against ancient black basalt rock faces, storm clouds swirling overhead with rays of light breaking through, lush green clifftop grass bending in fierce winds, turbulent dark ocean waters, cinematic wide angle, hyperrealistic photography

scenery.title: Namib Desert Star Dunes at Dawn Namibia
scenery.prompt: A breathtaking dawn scene in the Namib Desert, Namibia, featuring the iconic star dunes of Sossusvlei bathed in warm golden and orange light. The massive red sand dunes cast long dramatic shadows across the pristine desert floor. A crescent moon still lingers in the pale blue sky above the horizon. In the distance, a lone dead acacia tree stands silhouetted against the glowing dunes. Shot with cinematic wide-angle composition, photorealistic, 8K, National Geographic quality.

scenery.title: Iceland Volcanic Black Sand Beach Aurora
scenery.prompt: A breathtaking panoramic view of Iceland's iconic black volcanic sand beach at night, with dramatic green and purple aurora borealis ribbons dancing across the star-filled sky, powerful Atlantic waves crashing against jet-black shores, jagged basalt sea stacks silhouetted against the luminous aurora, distant snow-capped volcanoes glowing faintly, ultra-realistic photography style, long exposure, cinematic lighting.
